title: Update Settings
description: Configure the TripAdvisor Reviews Scraper parameters including filters for language, ratings, and date range

content.introduction: Configure your TripAdvisor Reviews Scraper squid settings to control review collection limits and apply filters by language, rating, and recency. These settings help you target specific review types and optimize credit usage.

squidParams.title: Squid Parameters
squidParams.content: The following parameters can be configured in the `params` object:

rows.description: Maximum number of unique results retrieved across all tasks in the entire run. Leave empty for unlimited.
Maximum number of reviews to collect per task. Leave empty for unlimited.

Filter reviews by language. Options: "Any language", "English", "Arabic", "Chinese", "Chinese (Traditional)", "Danish", "Dutch", "French", "German", "Greek", "Hebrew", "Indonesian", "Italian", "Japanese", "Korean", "Norwegian", "Portuguese (Brazil)", "Portuguese (Portugal)", "Russian", "Spanish", "Swedish", "Thai", "Turkish", "Vietnamese". Default: "Any language".
Filter reviews by star rating. Options: "Any rating", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5". Default: "Any rating".
Only collect reviews published within the last X hours. Leave empty for all reviews.

generalSettings.title: General Settings
generalSettings.content: Standard squid settings that apply to all scrapers:

rows.description: Mark squid as complete when all tasks finish
Remove line breaks from text fields

proTips.content: Use the language and ratings filters to collect only high-quality reviews in your target language, reducing noise and credit consumption.
Set fetch_since to null for all reviews, or specify a number of hours (e.g., 168 for one week) to monitor only recent reviews.
Reviews include subratings (Value, Rooms, Location, Cleanliness, Service, Sleep Quality) for hotels, providing detailed insights beyond the overall rating.

seo.title: Update Settings - TripAdvisor Reviews Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Configure your TripAdvisor Reviews Scraper with filters for language, ratings, recency, and result limits for targeted review collection.
